field_values.action_summary: The narrator and Tars Tarkas arrive at a grand, ancient city built by an extinct race. As they move through the streets, the narrator observes the biological differences of the Martians and their callous attitude toward death and violence.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide establishing shots of massive architecture; Medium tracking shots of duo walking through crowds; Close-ups on Martian biological details (tusks, skin texture)
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Scale comparison between narrator and oversized architecture/Martians
Lighting consistency in the open plaza
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH004_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the overwhelming scale of an ancient, extinct civilization through white marble and gold architecture. Contrast this grandeur with the brutal, callous biological reality of the current Martian inhabitants to shift the tone from awe to dread.

## Required Cast
- The Narrator
- tars_tarkas (Large, powerful green Martian humanoid)

## Required Environments
- ancient_martian_city_ruins (White marble, gold inlay, grand scale, low table land near dried sea)

## Continuity Constraints
- Scale comparison between the narrator and the oversized architecture/Martians.
- Lighting consistency in the open plaza.

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the grand city.
- BT002: Walking through the streets.
- BT003: Observing Martian culture/biology.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
